title: Expand My Chest
summary: The Quranic plea of Musa asking Allah for openness, ease, and speech that people can understand.
repeat_guidance: No fixed repetition count is attached in this entry.

supplications.arabic: رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي وَاحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِّن لِّسَانِي يَفْقَهُوا قَوْلِي
supplications.transliteration: Rabbishrah li sadri, wa yassir li amri, wahlul uqdatan min lisani, yafqahu qawli.
supplications.translation: My Lord, expand for me my chest, ease for me my task, and untie the knot from my tongue so they may understand my speech.
